upgrades.name: Tier 1 Tech
upgrades.description: Doubles income (2x base). Unlocks Tier 1 towers/units. Requires: 1 Boss Kill.

upgrades.name: Tier 2 Tech
upgrades.description: Doubles income again (4x base). Unlocks Tier 2 towers/units. Requires: 3 Boss Kills.

upgrades.name: Tier 3 Tech
upgrades.description: Doubles income again (8x base). Unlocks Tier 3. Requires: 25 Boss Kills.
